body:
- Update to julia 1.10
- Expand CPU targets for Caltech cluster
- Use MPITrampoline and newer HDF5
- Update GitHub action workflows to most recent versions
- Remove CUDAKernels, and use the most recent KernelAbstractions (moving from `device` to `backend` and from `wait` to `sync`)
- Remove unused dependencies
title: Update to julia and GPU tests
